description: This Rust source file is the main executable for a command-line tool that manages C2PA manifests, including displaying, creating, signing, and embedding manifests into assets. It handles command-line arguments, configuration, signing, and various operations related to manifest processing.

classes.name: CliArgs
classes.description: Struct representing command-line arguments for the CLI tool.

classes.name: TrustResource
classes.description: Enum representing a trust resource, either a file path or a URL.

classes.name: Commands
classes.description: Enum representing subcommands for trust configuration and content fragmentation.

classes.name: ManifestDef
classes.description: Struct for deserializing manifest definition JSON, including additional ingredient paths.

methods.name: parse_resource_string
methods.description: Parses a string into a TrustResource, distinguishing between URL and file path.

methods.name: special_errs
methods.description: Converts c2pa::Error variants into user-friendly error messages.

methods.name: load_ingredient
methods.description: Loads an Ingredient from a file or directory, supporting JSON ingredients.

methods.name: load_trust_resource
methods.description: Loads trust resource data from a file or URL.

methods.name: configure_sdk
methods.description: Configures the c2pa SDK trust settings based on command-line arguments.

methods.name: sign_fragmented
methods.description: Signs fragmented media files by adding manifests to each fragment set.

methods.name: verify_fragmented
methods.description: Verifies fragmented media files by reading and validating each fragment set.

methods.name: main
methods.description: Main entry point for the CLI tool, handling argument parsing and command execution.
